articles.author: Lee Ying Shan
articles.title: Asia markets rise as investors weigh Iran military activity against signs of temporary U.S.-Iran deal - CNBC
articles.description: Asia-Pacific markets rose as investors shrugged off renewed Iran tensions against ceasefire optimism.
articles.content: Asia-Pacific markets traded higher on Friday as investors weighed fresh military activity involving Iran against signs that Washington and Tehran were moving closer to a temporary agreement to halt t… [+1975 chars]
